# Stage 04 Source/Sink Flows — All Severities

Generated by CodeQL structural extraction, built-in CodeQL, Semgrep Pro, and custom P4 rules. Low/correctness results are retained here for traceability; Phase 4 enrichment decides keep/drop. Merged SARIF is retained at `piolium/attack-surface/sast-merged.sarif`; per-tool `piolium/codeql-res/` and `piolium/semgrep-res/` directories were transient and cleaned after report generation.

| Source kind | Threat model | Count | Example locations |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| cli-handler-parameter | local | 7 | `src/add.ts:895`, `src/add.ts:895`, `src/add.ts:1882`, `src/find.ts:270`, `src/remove.ts:282` |
| fetch-response-content | remote | 9 | `src/blob.ts:109`, `src/blob.ts:260`, `src/blob.ts:281`, `src/find.ts:40`, `src/providers/wellknown.ts:140` |
| filesystem-read | file/local | 25 | `scripts/execute-tests.ts:47`, `scripts/generate-licenses.ts:35`, `scripts/sync-agents.ts:100`, `scripts/sync-agents.ts:110`, `src/cli.ts:30` |
| process.argv | local | 2 | `scripts/execute-tests.ts:79`, `src/cli.ts:884` |
| process.env | environment | 49 | `bin/cli.mjs:6`, `bin/cli.mjs:6`, `src/agents.ts:10`, `src/agents.ts:10`, `src/agents.ts:11` |

## CodeQL Source-to-Sink Slice Reachability

| Slice | Reachable | Paths | Source | Sink | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---|---|---|
| P4-001 | true | 8 | process.argv/runAdd source | git.clone(url, tempDir, cloneOptions) | CodeQL path found |
| P4-002 | true | 8 | parseSource().ref | cloneOptions ['--branch', ref] -> git.clone | CodeQL path found |
| P4-003 | false | 0 | cloned tempDir files/symlinks | cp(srcPath,destPath,{dereference:true}) | Custom Semgrep matched sink at src/installer.ts:365; CodeQL did not model cloned filesystem contents as taint source |
| P4-004 | false | 0 | download.files[].path/contents | installBlobSkillForAgent writeFile | Custom Semgrep matched src/installer.ts:773; CodeQL did not connect JSON response object fields through installer closure |
| P4-005 | false | 0 | entry.files[]/fileResponse.text() | installWellKnownSkillForAgent writeFile | Custom Semgrep matched src/installer.ts:652; CodeQL tracked well-known fetch to parseYaml/fetch but not Map file writes |
| P4-006 | true | 12 | process.argv add source URL | fetch(indexUrl/skillMdUrl/fileUrl) | CodeQL path found |
| P4-007 | false | 0 | parseSource localPath | copyDirectory/createSymlink | No precomputed CodeQL path; source and sink enumerated; manual review required for local-path trust boundary |
| P4-008 | true | 4 | JSON.parse(readFile(lock)) | spawnSync(process.execPath,[cliEntry,add,installUrl,...]) | CodeQL path found |
| P4-009 | false | 0 | remove args/lock skill names | rm(path,{recursive:true}) | Sinks enumerated; no source-to-rm path produced by custom query |
| P4-010 | true | 16 | SKILLS_DOWNLOAD_URL/SKILLS_API_URL/env | fetch(url) | CodeQL path found |
| P4-011 | true | 8 | XDG_STATE_HOME/CODEX_HOME/CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR/VIBE_HOME | mkdir/writeFile/readFile under env-derived dirs | CodeQL path found |
| P4-012 | false | 0 | process.env/PATH | execSync('gh auth token') and simpleGit env | Custom Semgrep matched src/skill-lock.ts:146 and source/sink enumeration captured process.env; no CodeQL path generated |
| P4-013 | true | 2 | response.text()/readFile SKILL.md content | parseYaml(match[1]) | CodeQL path found |
| P4-014 | false | 0 | skills.sh search result skill.source/name | runFind -> runAdd/parseSource/fetch/clone | Built-in CodeQL flagged search URL fetch; no result-to-install path was produced |
| P4-015 | false | 0 | .claude-plugin/*.json skills paths | getPluginSkillPaths -> discoverSkills | Sources/sinks enumerated; no source-to-discovery path produced |

## High-Signal Security Candidate Paths

| Candidate | Source | Sink | Evidence | Draft |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| direct git URL/ref to simple-git clone | CLI argv / lock update source | `git.clone(url,tempDir,cloneOptions)` | CodeQL P4-001/P4-002 reachable; custom Semgrep p4-simple-git-clone-untrusted-source | p4-001 |
| untrusted repo symlink dereference during install | remote git/local skill tree files | `cp(srcPath,destPath,{dereference:true})` | Semgrep p4-fs-cp-dereference; DFD-01/P4-003 CodeQL sink enumerated | p4-002 |
| HTTP well-known discovery installs agent skills | CLI URL / network attacker | `fetch(indexUrl/SKILL.md/fileUrl)` and install writes | CodeQL js/request-forgery P4-006 reachable; Semgrep p4-wellknown-http-url-accepted | p4-003 |
| well-known unbounded fetch/frontmatter parse | remote host response body | `response.text()/json()` -> `parseYaml` | CodeQL P4-013 reachable; Semgrep p4-wellknown-fetch-missing-timeout and p4-frontmatter-parse-without-size-limit | p4-004 |
| duplicate frontmatter first-wins namespace shadowing | remote repo SKILL.md metadata | skill selection/dedup by name | Semgrep p4-duplicate-frontmatter-first-wins at skills.ts:198/217 | p4-005 |
| skills.sh blob snapshot install not verified against GitHub tree/ref | skills.sh download JSON / env base URL | blob install writeFile + lock hash | CodeQL P4-010 env/download fetch reachable; Semgrep remote write sinks | p4-006 |
| lockfile update source self-spawns installer | project/global lock JSON | `spawnSync(process.execPath,[cliEntry, add, installUrl,...])` | CodeQL P4-008 reachable | p4-007 |
| node_modules dependency skills sync to installer | npm package contents | `discoverNodeModuleSkills` -> `installSkillForAgent` | Semgrep p4-node-modules-skill-sync-to-installer; Phase 3 supply-chain target | p4-008 |
